title: Copilot Instructions for eulerr
text: eulerr R package R orchestration layer C++ computational core (via Rcpp): User entry points: euler() venn() S3 generics (R/euler.R, R/venn.R) methods vectors, data frames, matrices, tables, lists. Input normalization: methods convert varied inputs named overlap vectors (R/parse_input.R + helpers R/utils.R), combination names joined &. Fitting pipeline: fit_diagram() (R/fit_diagram.R) validates input, converts union/disjoint representations, initializes layout, optimizes geometry, computes fit metrics (regionError, diagError, stress). Numerical engine: geometry/intersection/loss routines src/*.cpp, exposed generated Rcpp bindings R/RcppExports.R src/RcppExports.cpp. nlm() attempted first; optional GenSA refinement used hard ellipse fits. setup_geometry() computes polygons/centers/bounds. setup_grobs() converts geometry grid grobs. returns eulergram gTree plot.eulergram()/print.eulergram() draws. Global plotting defaults: eulerr_options() .eulerr_env$options (R/eulerr_options.R, R/zzz.R) provide package-wide visual defaults used plotting code.

title: Copilot Instructions for eulerr
text: roxygen2-managed package. NAMESPACE generated; update roxygen comments R/*.R run make document instead editing NAMESPACE manually. RcppExports files generated Rcpp::compileAttributes(); hand-edit R/RcppExports.R src/RcppExports.cpp. README.md generated README.Rmd; edit README.Rmd README changes. Plotting implemented grid grobs (eulergram) rather base graphics; preserve setup_geometry() → setup_grobs() separation changing plotting behavior. Input combination naming uses & delimiters (e.g., "&B&C"). Parsing/validation assumes format across euler(), fit_diagram(), parsing helpers. Styling R files follows air.toml (line-width = 80, indent-width = 2).

title: Area-proportional Euler diagrams — euler
text: input matrix data frame argument specified, function returns list euler diagrams. function minimizes residual sums squares, $$   \sum_{=1}^n (A_i - \omega_i)^2, $$ default, \(\omega_i\) size ith disjoint subset, \(A_i\) corresponding area diagram, , unique contribution total area overlap. loss function can, however, controlled via loss argument. euler() also returns stress (venneuler), well diagError, regionError eulerAPE. stress statistic computed $$   \frac{\sum_{=1}^n (A_i - \beta\omega_i)^2}{\sum_{=1}^n A_i^2}, $$ $$   \beta = \sum_{=1}^n A_i\omega_i / \sum_{=1}^n \omega_i^2. $$ regionError computed $$   \left| \frac{A_i}{\sum_{=1}^n A_i} - \frac{\omega_i}{\sum_{=1}^n \omega_i}\right|. $$ diagError simply maximum regionError.
